## Meeting Purpose

[To review client updates and align on the Strategy Sprint process timeline/expectations with focus on the task tracker.](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Sprint Timeline Clarified**: Detailed week-by-week responsibilities established - with artifacts in week 2, strategy presentation in week 3, first content delivery in week 4, and handoff prep in weeks 5-6](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Content Audit Process**: Jo's content audit approach (currently used for Outreach and Diligent) should be documented and standardized; Dave will collaborate on enhancing SEO audit components](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [**Client-Specific Notes**: Diligent requires special handling as they're seeking more consultant-style support; Dave will be introduced as SEO expert to manage expectations](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [**Execution Handoff**: Strategy documentation in Notion is crucial for execution teams; formal handoff typically occurs weeks 5-6 with appropriate context-setting](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

## Topics

### Client Updates & Special Handling

  - [Aida flagged that Diligent is asking for more consultant-style advice than typical strategy sprint clients](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Team agreed Dave should be introduced as SEO expert to handle these specific requests without scope creep](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Diligent's website taxonomy is already strong; recommendations limited to content refreshes, internal linking improvements, and SEO best practices](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Andi cautioned that the Diligent contact might suggest bigger changes to protect their job position](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)

### Strategy Sprint Process Timeline Refinement

  - [**Week 1 (Kickoff)**: Introduce project, gain system access, schedule meetings, begin collecting materials](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [**Week 2**: Complete customer/market research, validate ICP, send initial artifacts for refinement, conduct deep dives, schedule team calibration, set up Scrunch, discuss image requirements](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [**Week 3**: Finalize and present content strategy, create strategy documentation in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**Week 4**: Deliver first blog post or first batch of refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [**Week 5**: Generate additional assignments, prepare materials for handoff, set up Looker Dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [**Week 6**: Continue content production, meet with handoff team, ensure 6-8 weeks of assignments](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

### Content Audit Process Standardization

  - [Jo has developed effective content audit approaches for Outreach and Diligent clients using decision trees for content evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Team identified need to document this process through Loom recordings or Notion documentation](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Dave offered to collaborate on standardizing the audit process with enhanced SEO components](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Discussion around tooling - Jo prefers Google Sheets over Airtable for audits due to VLOOKUP limitations, but team will explore Airtable automation options](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

### Refresh Process Challenges

  - [Ade reported challenges with the Atlas Pipeline refresh, noting the content was too new and performing well](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [Had to switch to manual refresh approach, focusing on enriching with Diligent's AI solutions positioning](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Aida requested Ade submit a Linear ticket explaining issues with the refresh pipeline to improve scalability](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### Content Roadmap and Handoff Expectations

  - [Strategy Sprint typically delivers 60 ready assignments to execution team (5-7 published pieces per week)](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [Handoff includes formal introduction of execution team (typically Panzer) around week 5-6](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Sydney and Jo create strategy documents in Notion as deliverables for execution teams](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Discussion about need for clearer guidance to execution teams on long-term strategy beyond initial assignments](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jo will document her content audit process through Looms or Notion documentation (after her upcoming vacation)](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Dave will take lead on enhancing SEO audit components and collaborate with Jo on standardization](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Ade will complete Diligent's Atlas Pipeline refresh within the next hour and file a Linear ticket about refresh pipeline issues](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [Andi will reassign Ambient and Clark clients (new strategy kickoffs next week)](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Team will implement the clarified week-by-week process for ongoing and future Strategy Sprints](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Andi will follow up with Nico regarding Ade's Linear ticket about refresh pipeline improvements](https://fathom.video/share/4aCt_Md6rkZFeWvbJsthiQqzp-_G69kY?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
